channel.title: Alan Liang Blog
channel.description: I am a undergraduate student at the University of Wisconsin-Madison pursuing majors in Computer Science and Enviornmental Studies with a certificate in Data Science. I am excited to learn new skills and apply them to tackle world problems. I'm passionate about fullstack development, AI governance, and environmental justice. Let's connect and explore the different potentials of technology within our society!

item.title: Reflection on computer science culture among students
item.description: Personal reflection on my experience in the bay area as an intern.
item.content:encoded:
Personal reflection on my experience in the bay area as an intern.

Read the full post

item.title: Bombs and Bikinis: The Story of Nuclear Testing in the Pacific
item.description: History paper I wrote for HIST460 at UW-Madison. Was nominated for undergraduate history writing award
item.content:encoded:
History paper I wrote for HIST460 at UW-Madison. Was nominated for undergraduate history writing award
